flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Fairfield University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.9k → $58.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Fairfield University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($52.9k → $58.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fairfield University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Fairfield University are 32% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($88.8k vs $67.4k).
